description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic helicopter with a streamlined, pod-like fuselage that is predominantly white with blue accent stripes running along its length. The body is smooth and rounded, with a robust central section that appears to house the engine and mechanical components. Two articulated, claw-like appendages extend from the sides, possibly functioning as landing supports or manipulators, and are constructed from dark metal. The rear section is cylindrical and features a dark, circular exhaust or intake port, with visible wiring and mechanical details. The helicopter lacks visible traditional rotor blades or tail rotor, suggesting a unique propulsion system. There are no visible cockpit windows or registration markings, giving it a highly stylized, almost sci-fi appearance.
description: A compact, futuristic helicopter with a smooth white and blue pod-like body, dark mechanical appendages, and no visible cockpit windows or rotors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, blue stripes, and symmetrical mechanical arms extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated pod shape, blue accent stripe, and detailed mechanical structure at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the circular exhaust port and the symmetrical arrangement of the mechanical arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the pod body, blue stripe, and mechanical details.
attribute_landing_skids: No traditional landing skids; features two articulated, claw-like mechanical arms made of dark metal, likely serving as landing supports.
